# terrible_awx_awx_job_template (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name to use for the job template.

### Optional

- `allow_simultaneous` (Boolean) Allow simultaneous runs of the job template.
- `ask_credential_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for credential on launch.
- `ask_diff_mode_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user to enable diff mode (show changes) to files when supported by modules.
- `ask_execution_environment_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for execution environment on launch.
- `ask_forks_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for forks on launch.
- `ask_instance_groups_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for instance groups on launch.
- `ask_inventory_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for inventory on launch.
- `ask_job_slice_count_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for job slice count on launch.
- `ask_job_type_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for job type on launch.
- `ask_labels_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for labels on launch.
- `ask_limit_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for a limit on launch.
- `ask_scm_branch_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for (scm branch) on launch.
- `ask_skip_tags_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for job tags to skip on launch.
- `ask_tags_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for job tags on launch.
- `ask_timeout_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for timeout on launch.
- `ask_variables_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user for (extra_vars) on launch.
- `ask_verbosity_on_launch` (Boolean) Prompt user to choose a verbosity level on launch.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `become_enabled` (Boolean) Activate privilege escalation.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `copy_from` (String) Name or id to copy the job template from. This will copy an existing job template and change any parameters supplied. The new job template name will be the one provided in the name parameter. The organization parameter is not used in this, to facilitate copy from one organization to another. Provide the id or use the lookup plugin to provide the id if multiple job templates share the same name.
- `credential` (String) Name, ID, or named URL of the credential to use for the job template. Deprecated, use 'credentials'.
- `credentials` (String) List of credential names, IDs, or named URLs to use for the job template.
- `custom_virtualenv` (String) Local absolute file path containing a custom Python virtualenv to use. Only compatible with older versions of AWX/Tower Deprecated, will be removed in the future
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description to use for the job template.
- `diff_mode` (Boolean) Enable diff mode for the job template.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `execution_environment` (String) Execution Environment name, ID, or named URL to use for the job template.
- `extra_vars` (String) Specify `extra_vars` for the template.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `force_handlers` (Boolean) Enable forcing playbook handlers to run even if a task fails.
- `forks` (Number) The number of parallel or simultaneous processes to use while executing the playbook.
- `host_config_key` (String) Allow provisioning callbacks using this host config key.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `instance_groups` (String) list of Instance Group names, IDs, or named URLs for this Organization to run on.
- `inventory` (String) Name, ID, or named URL of the inventory to use for the job template.
- `job_slice_count` (Number) The number of jobs to slice into at runtime. Will cause the Job Template to launch a workflow if value is greater than 1.
- `job_tags` (String) Comma separated list of the tags to use for the job template.
- `job_type` (String) The job type to use for the job template.
- `labels` (String) The labels applied to this job template Must be created with the labels module first. This will error if the label has not been created.
- `limit` (String) A host pattern to further constrain the list of hosts managed or affected by the playbook
- `new_name` (String) Setting this option will change the existing name (looked up via the name field.
- `notification_templates_error` (String) list of notifications to send on error
- `notification_templates_started` (String) list of notifications to send on start
- `notification_templates_success` (String) list of notifications to send on success
- `organization` (String) Organization name, ID, or named URL the job template exists in. Used to help lookup the object, cannot be modified using this module. The Organization is inferred from the associated project If not provided, will lookup by name only, which does not work with duplicates. Requires Automation Platform Version 3.7.0 or AWX 10.0.0 IS NOT backwards compatible with earlier versions.
- `playbook` (String) Path to the playbook to use for the job template within the project provided.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `prevent_instance_group_fallback` (Boolean) Prevent falling back to instance groups set on the associated inventory or organization
- `project` (String) Name, ID, or named URL of the project to use for the job template.
- `scm_branch` (String) Branch to use in job run. Project default used if blank. Only allowed if project allow_override field is set to true.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `start_at_task` (String) Start the playbook at the task matching this name.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the resource.
- `survey_enabled` (Boolean) Enable a survey on the job template.
- `survey_spec` (String) JSON/YAML dict formatted survey definition.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_fact_cache` (Boolean) Enable use of fact caching for the job template.
- `vault_credential` (String) Name, ID, or named URL of the vault credential to use for the job template. Deprecated, use 'credentials'.
- `verbosity` (Number) Control the output level Ansible produces as the playbook runs. 0 - Normal, 1 - Verbose, 2 - More Verbose, 3 - Debug, 4 - Connection Debug.
- `webhook_credential` (String) Personal Access Token for posting back the status to the service API
- `webhook_service` (String) Service that webhook requests will be accepted from

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
